case_title: UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0 VS. AADOP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT H. STALEY RE PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FILED BY PETITIONER UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY RESPONDENT AADOP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY FKA UNITEDLAYER, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0'S NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR DUE TO THE FILING OF BANKRUPTCY OF THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0 RE-NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITION IS GRANTED. ON APRIL 12, 2012, THE COURT GRANTED RESPONDENT'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONSIDER ITS UN-FILED OBJECTIONS TO THE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT. COPY OF SAME WAS PROVIDED TO THE COURT BY PETITIONER'S COUNSEL. THE COURT HAS READ AND CONSIDERED RESPONDENT'S OBJECTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE OBJECTION IS AN IMPERMISSIBLE REQUEST TO REVISIT AND CHANGE THE BASIS OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT) JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-13-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT AADOP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY FKA UNITEDLAYER, LLC $749,731.77 PRINCIPAL, $52,379.55 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $802,111.32, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hrg Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb Award; Req For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Stanley, Esq., Law Office, 415-398-2200, for petitioner and moving party
Deborah Perlman, Esq., from Perlman Law, Inc., 310-551-0155, for defendant and opposing party, appearing by telephone

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER UNITEDLAYER, LLC FKA UNITEDLAYER 2.0 Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration award.
Petition is Granted. On April 12, 2012, the Court granted Respondent's ex parte application to consider its un-filed Objections to the Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award and Proposed Judgment. Copy of same was provided to the Court by Petitioner's counsel. The Court has read and considered Respondent's Objection. The Court finds that the Objection is an impermissible request to revisit and change the basis of the arbitration award. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and judgment) Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb Award
Off Calendar Nov-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
